properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v1 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7 v6 v7 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a name Sinless, pure and just Righteous Son of God In You we place our trust

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is a name Precious lamb of God Mighty One and Holy His Name is Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Your Name is power, Jesus! You're worthy, Jesus! Glory to the highest!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You are our Saviour, Jesus! Redeemer, Jesus! Glory to the highest! We sing glory to the highest!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are mighty to save You have conquered the grave You are greater above all names

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You are Lord of Lords You are King of all kings You are greater above all names
